goal: Structural reference fixture: documents example model resolution outcomes for Orchestrator dispatches at selected complexity tiers. Offline evals do not execute live runSubagent calls and cannot observe live model parameters, so this scenario is reference-only rather than a behavioral runtime assertion.

input.offline_eval_limitation: No live agent/runSubagent invocation occurs during offline evals, so the harness cannot verify which model parameter is passed at runtime.
input.verified_target_agent_field_evidence: VS Code Insiders build 7e4091cc0c, resources/app/out/vs/workbench/api/worker/extensionHostWorkerMain.js ~pos 1502074: RunSubagentTool.getToolData() defines o.agentName={type:'string',description:'Name of the agent to invoke.'} and o.model={type:'string',description:'Optional model for the subagent...'}. Invoke path at ~pos 1502836 extracts x=s.agentName confirming the field name. This is the authoritative source; no guessing of agentName was required.

reference_cases.dispatch_context: Initial dispatch when primary model is available. Effective review tier = MEDIUM (normal plan review, no unresolved HIGH-impact risk). Orchestrator resolves primary from governance/model-routing.json roles.capable-reviewer.by_tier.MEDIUM and calls agent/runSubagent with agentName=<exact-agent-name> and model=<resolved-by-tier primary>.

First retry after primary Claude Sonnet 4.6 (copilot) is unavailable for MEDIUM review. Orchestrator resolves fallbacks[0] from governance/model-routing.json roles.capable-reviewer.by_tier.MEDIUM.fallbacks. Must NOT use any model outside the configured by_tier fallback list for the effective tier.

Unresolved applicable HIGH-impact risk_review entry forces effective review tier to LARGE regardless of plan complexity_tier. Orchestrator resolves capable-reviewer models using LARGE (inherit_from default), providing premium routing.

reference_expectation.first_fallback_model_source: governance/model-routing.json roles.capable-reviewer.fallbacks[0] via LARGE inherit_from default

reference_cases.dispatch_context: Planner or Orchestrator research delegation to CodeMapper resolves through governance/model-routing.json agent_role_index.CodeMapper-subagent -> roles.fast-readonly and must pass the resolved primary model explicitly to agent/runSubagent.

Intentional exception: ExecutabilityVerifier resolves through review-readonly role, not capable-reviewer. Its primary model is Claude Sonnet 4.6 (copilot). This is correct behavior and must be preserved.
